arts.ttl: Leeds United faithful will love Marti Cifuentes' classy comments after QPR thriller
arts.sum: Cifuentes made the admission after the R's enthralling 2-2 daw with Daniel Farke's team at Loftus Road today. Queens Park Rangers head coach Marti Cifuentes is convinced Leeds United are Premier League-bound as the Championship promotion race hots up.

arts.ttl: 'Angry' Leeds United chief Daniel Farke holds hands up as QPR draw dents title hopes
arts.sum: Farke said: "I am angry with myself because until the early hours I was thinking about bringing Gruev in for our defensive side to show resilience. Attacking midfielder Brenden Aaronson was hooked at half-time and replaced by Wilfried Gnonto, who was involved in the build up to Jayden Bogle's equaliser.

arts.ttl: Championship roundup: Bogle rescues point for leaders Leeds
arts.sum: QPR pulled back after going two up Ivanovic’s pen wins game for Millwall Leeds came back from two down to rescue a point in a 2-2 draw at QPR. Goals against the run of play by Koki Saito and Steve Cook put the home side, who had lost their previous four matches, into a surprise lead. But Morgan Fox’s own goal gave the visitors a much-needed boost before the interval and Jayden Bogle equalised soon after the restart. Rangers ended the match with 10 men after Saito was sent off in stoppage time for a studs-up challenge on Dan James. This story will be updated Continue reading...

arts.sum: The Leeds boss wasted no time in making a change at the break, replacing the 24-year-old with Willy Gnonto . "Willy Gnonto has done more in the last 10 minutes than Brenden Aaronson did in the entire first half.

arts.ttl: Leeds hit back at QPR but still drop crucial points in promotion race
arts.sum: Sky Bet Championship leaders Leeds came back from two down to rescue a point in a 2-2 draw at QPR.

arts.ttl: Leeds earn a point at QPR but drop more points in pursuit of promotion
arts.sum: QPR had been two goals ahead.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings vs Queens Park Rangers as Gnonto and Bogle great
arts.sum: An own goal from Morgan Fox got Leeds back into the game with a flick from a Manor Solomon cross. Gave QPR defence a tough afternoon with his dribbles and deliveries, and provided the cross for United's first half goal before his close-range shot led to Bogle's leveller.

arts.ttl: Pundits reveal big Leeds United hope as Stuart Dallas makes intriguing Sheffield United point
arts.sum: "I think Sheffield United deserve a little bit more credit than they are getting," said former Whites star Stuart Dallas. When asked about the promotion race, Brown said: " Leeds all the way.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs QPR as Joe Rothwell starts amid big Daniel Farke call
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has decided to name Joe Rothwell in an unchanged Leeds United starting line-up to take on Queens Park Rangers at Loftus Road this afternoon. Starting XI: Meslier; Bogle, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo; Tanaka, Rothwell; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe.

arts.ttl: Everton looking to sign another Leeds player after Jack Harrison
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly ready to rival Leeds United for the transfer of Tottenham attacking midfielder Manor Solomon this summer. The Israel international is currently impressing on loan from Spurs at Leeds, and his future will surely be something to keep a close eye on this summer.
